title: Backend Engineer
description: Most travel platforms are built by people who have never missed a flight, lost a booking, or been handed a key to the wrong room. We have. TripTrip exists because travel deserves better. We are building a next-gen OTA and travel social app where booking your next trip and sharing it with the world happen in the same place. The platform we always wished existed. We are launching in April 2026 from Istanbul , a city that has been a crossroads of the world for thousands of years and still refuses to sit still. Our goal is simple and unreasonably ambitious: to become the most used travel app on the planet. To get there, we are looking for people who know how to build from zero, who bring creativity and discipline in equal measure, and who get genuinely excited by a goal that sounds too big. Right now we are looking for a Backend Engineer to join us at the very beginning. The person who will build the technical foundation that every TripTrip booking, every social post, and every AI feature runs on. Not someone who maintains systems. Someone who architects them. What Does The Ideal Candidate Look Like Have 3 to 5 years of backend engineering experience and have built things that real people use Write clean, scalable TypeScript and Node.js without being asked to Know PostgreSQL deeply enough to design a schema that holds up at scale Have integrated third-party APIs before and know how to handle the ones that break at the worst possible moment Are comfortable with uncertainty and make good architectural decisions with incomplete information Think about video pipelines, AI integrations and real-time feeds as exciting challenges, not scary unknowns Take ownership of the entire backend , not just the ticket in front of you Are fluent in English and Turkish and communicate technical decisions clearly to non-technical people You do not wait for a perfect spec. You ask the right questions, make a call and build. What You'll Do Design and build the backend infrastructure that powers every TripTrip booking, social post and AI feature Own the Duffel API integration end to end and expand it to Amadeus , Hotelbeds and Sabre as we grow Build and maintain the payment layer with Stripe and Adyen, including webhooks, reconciliation and edge case handling Architect the short-form video pipeline from upload to delivery, built for speed and scale Integrate AI features that make TripTrip smarter, from personalized recommendations to intelligent search Design and maintain the PostgreSQL schema as the product evolves and data complexity grows Build real-time features that power the social feed, booking updates and live notifications Write APIs that the frontend team can build on without coming back to ask questions Set the engineering standards , code review culture and technical documentation practices from day one Use AI tools daily for development, testing and debugging, because we are building a company where AI is part of how everyone works Work directly with the founders to make architectural decisions that will define TripTrip for years You are not a feature factory. You are the person who decides how this thing is built. What We Offer Creative ownership and a collaborative culture where your ideas actually ship A team that values innovation, craft and quality in equal measure A competitive salary benchmarked to Istanbul's tech market, because good people deserve fair pay. Range: 1,000,000 TRY to 2,000,000 TRY gross depending on experience Founding team status. This is not a listing for employee number 49. For the right person, the path to CTO is a real conversation Travel perks and platform access that grow as the company grows Direct access to founders who are in the trenches with you, not watching from above Remote work until our Istanbul office opens in Q3 2026, then hybrid A culture built on discipline, creativity and straight talk Private health and eye insurance from month six Performance bonuses tied to company growth We are not promising a comfortable ride. We are promising a meaningful one. You can apply via LinkedIn EasyApply + send your portfolio to emre@triptrip.app email address.
